audit_object: 以R004212为线索的拆分报销异常

audit_period.reason: R004212 expense_date ± 7 days per Article 11 split reimbursement window

policy_questions.question: Which policy version applies to the 2025-04-10/04-15 expense events?
What is the split reimbursement rule?
policy_questions.clause: 第十一条: 同一员工、同一费用类型在7天内出现2笔及以上报销,且合计金额达到《授权管理办法》附件二较高审批线的,应重点核查拆分规避审批

policy_questions.question: What are the authorization approval thresholds?

data_questions.question: What records exist for E0009 with travel_lodging within ±7 days of 2025-04-10?
Do R004212 and R004213 share the same employee, expense type, and fall within 7 days?
data_questions.result: Yes: both E0009, travel_lodging, 5 days apart

data_questions.question: Does the combined amount reach a higher approval line?
data_questions.result: Combined ¥10,200 ≥ AR-03 threshold ¥10,000; individual ¥5,100 each in AR-02 range

evidence_needed: Complete search proof for E0009 travel_lodging in the 7-day window
execution_steps: 2. Batch-expense-analysis: search E0009 travel_lodging in 7-day window
3. Verify combined amount crosses AR-03 threshold

reasons: aggregation/grouping: finding same-employee same-type records within date window (+1)
threshold/date boundary: 7-day window and ¥10,000 approval threshold (+1)

subagent_plan.reason: Compact mode sufficient: only two records in scope, single rule, no policy ambiguity, data already retrieved

stopping_conditions: All E0009 travel_lodging records in 2025-04-03 to 2025-04-17 window identified
Combined amount vs authorization threshold verified
